docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY BAWAL, BAKUL AS TO DEFENDANT PHANTOM TECHNOLOGIES, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-28-2025 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE SERVICE FEE: $85.00 REMARKS: I SPOKE TO AN INDIVIDUAL WHO IDENTIFIED THEMSELVES AS THE PERSON IN CHARGE AND THE STATED SERVICE NOT PERMITED. FILED BY PLAINTIFF BAWAL, BAKUL AS TO DEFENDANT PHANTOM TECHNOLOGIES, INC.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE BY JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF BAKUL BAWAL IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT PHANTOM TECHNOLOGIES, INC. IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
